hero.label: Puerto Rico · Caribbean
hero.sub: Puerto Rico's Premier Sport Fishing Experience — Tournaments, Trips & Festivals

tagline.heading: The Premier Sport Fishing Experience in the Caribbean
tagline.body: Where world-class deep-sea fishing meets Caribbean culture. From competitive tournaments to all-inclusive trips, IFT brings anglers together on the waters of Puerto Rico for unforgettable experiences year-round.

tournaments.heading:
Compete. Win.
Repeat.
tournaments.body: Enter Puerto Rico's most competitive fishing tournaments. Prize pools up to $50,000. All skill levels welcome — from weekend warriors to seasoned pros chasing billfish glory.

trips.heading:
Fish. Feast.
Repeat.
trips.body: All-inclusive fishing trips with lodging, meals, gear, and expert guides included. Leave the planning to us — just show up and fish. Starting at $899/person.

festival.heading: The Biggest Fishing Festival in Puerto Rico.
festival.body: Live music, local food, fishing competitions, and community. Family-friendly and open to all. An annual celebration of Caribbean fishing culture you won't want to miss.

about.heading: Born from a love of the sea.
about.p1: The International Fishing Team started with a simple belief: the waters of Puerto Rico deserve a world-class sport fishing organization. One that competes at the highest level while staying rooted in the culture and community of the Caribbean.
about.p2: From our first tournament off the coast of Fajardo to a growing calendar of twelve annual events, IFT has become the home for serious anglers and passionate newcomers alike. We run tournaments, organize all-inclusive trips, and host the biggest fishing festival on the island.
about.p3: This isn't just about catching fish. It's about building a community, growing the sport, and sharing the magic of Puerto Rico's deep blue waters with the world.

email.heading: Join the Crew
email.sub: Get tournament schedules, trip announcements, and exclusive offers delivered to your inbox.
email.disclaimer: No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. / Sin spam. Cancela cuando quieras.
